name: The Exile's Return
idea: The deck converts exile-zone interactions into a board-wide +1/+1 counter engine that feeds firebending mana, then closes with combat damage.

briefKills.line: blink + cast-from-exile engine running (Panharmonicon doubles enters-events) → Zuko 7+ power → counter-pumped board + 21 Zuko commander damage in ~3 swings
Hellkite Charger + Sozin's Comet (firebending 5 on all; only Diabolic Intent finds either) → 20R combat income pays Hellkite's 5RR → infinite extra combats → table

openings: Weakest axis — Kill reliability (4/5): the judges' soft spot.
Decap never-closes in 1% of goldfish games — a grind risk.
Tables (all three) never-close 12% of the time.

clock.caption: Decap (one opponent) lands around T8; the full table around T10.

gamePlan: The deck converts exile-zone interactions into a board-wide +1/+1 counter engine that feeds firebending mana, then closes with combat damage. Engine pieces split across three sub-systems:

finishers.name: Hellkite Charger + Firebending Stack
finishers.note: With Sozin's Comet up (firebending 5 on all your creatures for the turn) and Hellkite Charger out, attack with Hellkite + 3 other creatures: 5R from Hellkite firebending alone, +5R per supporting attacker = 20R floor.

finishers.name: Counter-Stacked Commander Damage
finishers.note: Cycle blink + cast-from-exile triggers to pile +1/+1 counters on Zuko.

finishers.name: Avatar Roku Dragons
finishers.note: The Legend of Roku reaches III (turn 3 of the saga), exile-and-transforms into Avatar Roku (4/4 firebending 4).

finishers.name: Sun Titan Loop
finishers.note: Sun Titan attacks → return a CMC≤3 permanent from graveyard.

finishers.name: Purphoros Passive Burn
finishers.note: Purphoros, God of the Forge: whenever **another** creature you control enters, 2 damage to each opponent.

rulings.name: Zuko's counter trigger fires on two events
rulings.note: casting a spell from exile and a permanent entering from exile. An airbended-then-recast permanent fires both (once on cast, once on ETB).

rulings.name: The counter goes on each creature you control
rulings.note: every flicker compounds the entire board, not just one creature.

rulings.name: Reanimation from the graveyard does NOT trigger Zuko.
rulings.note: Sun Titan, Karmic Guide, and Reanimate-style effects are "from graveyard," not "from exile" — they're resilience tools, not engine pieces.

rulings.name: Firebending mana lasts only until end of combat.
Panharmonicon doubles trigger #2
rulings.note: when the entering permanent is a creature or artifact.

rulings.name: Norin self-exiles
rulings.note: whenever any player casts a spell or attacks (returns at end of turn), so single-target removal rarely lands on him — and under Panharmonicon his return double-pumps the board.

rulings.name: Airbending your own bomb to recast for {2} is efficient and fires both triggers.
rulings.note: Airbending an opponent's creature only triggers Zuko if they choose to recast it (rare).

SIDEBOARD:
1 Cathars' Crusade
1 Gonti, Lord of Luxury
1 Outpost Siege
1 Swiftfoot Boots

1 Fire Lord Zuko

mull.strategy: Looking for: ramp + at least one engine piece by T3–4 — an impulse-draw source or a blinker plus something to blink — and a route to casting Zuko. Ship pure interaction piles even on perfect lands — with no cast-from-exile or blink piece the counter-stack never starts, and removal alone doesn't win the grind this deck plays.

killTree.title: The Exile's Return — Fire Lord Zuko
killTree.root:
Fire Lord Zuko resolved
each cast-from-exile + each permanent entering from exile puts +1/+1 on EACH creature you control
killTree.stall:
land an impulse-draw or blinker, then a doubler (Panharmonicon) / repeating blink
(Teleportation Circle, Airbender Ascension, Norin) — pile counters until Zuko swings
killTree.caption: cheapest line first · fall to the next

lines.need:
blink + cast-from-exile engine running
(Panharmonicon doubles enters-events) → Zuko 7+ power
lines.kill: counter-pumped board + 21 Zuko commander damage in ~3 swings

lines.need:
Hellkite Charger + Sozin's Comet
(firebending 5 on all; only Diabolic Intent finds either)
lines.kill: 20R combat income pays Hellkite's 5RR → infinite extra combats → table

lines.need:
The Legend of Roku III → Avatar Roku
(4/4 firebending 4)
lines.kill: attacks for 4R, funds dragon-token activations — backup when blink is down

lines.need:
Sun Titan attacks → return a ≤MV3 permanent
(+ a blink piece to re-loop it) (fallback)
lines.kill: rebuild the engine every attack → grind out, very durable post-wipe
